question: Based on the chart, which statement about rainfall (mm) over this two‑week period is most accurate?

options.A: Rainfall totals were higher during the first 7 days than during the last 7 days.
options.B: Rainfall totals were higher during the last 7 days than during the first 7 days.
options.C: The totals for the first and last 7 days were exactly the same.
options.D: It is impossible to compare totals for the first and last 7 days from this chart.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the first segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
